title: Billionaire Robert F . Smith Pays Off Morehouse Graduates Student Loans

body: I think the greatest thing you can do for a young person is to deliver him/her to the working world debt free.  Smith just did this for 300 people!  Such and awesome gift.  I hope you all use it wisely.

title: Billionaire Robert F . Smith Pays Off Morehouse Graduates Student Loans
body:
A wonderful, creative and extremely generous finish to Robert Smith's outstanding Commencement speech. 2019 is his class and we want to thank him very much for the great impact this will have on our 397 graduates.
Martin Rosenman, Prof of Psychology, Morehouse College
author: @martinrosenman1379

title: Billionaire Robert F . Smith Pays Off Morehouse Graduates Student Loans
body: I just saw this on the NBC nightly news and I'm white, but I think what he did was outstanding!   Race should not matter and what he did as a human being should be applauded.   God bless u sir!
author: @robertanderson1457

title: Billionaire Robert F . Smith Pays Off Morehouse Graduates Student Loans
body: As a part time faculty member, I find this incredibly inspiring.  Morehouse is not an inexpensive place to go to school, and there is no "in-state" tuition. Removing a mountain of student loan debt for hundreds of graduates is some of the best use of money I can imagine. And he still gave the school over a million dollars on top of that $40 million for the student debt. What a saint the man is!  I hope other mega-wealthy people step up and do likewise, and I hope the graduates take Mr. Smith's advice and pay it forward to future graduating classes. This is big, and I hope the start of a movement.
author: @mooretuba

title: Billionaire Robert F . Smith Pays Off Morehouse Graduates Student Loans
body: Mr. Smith truly has the passion to change the world! He exemplifies the Word which says, “Let my work speak for me.”
author: @thomasgoines8794

title: Morehouse College Commencement 🏡🎓
body:
Congratulations to all the Morehouse graduates of 2025 some of you.
Have graduated with your Master's degree or you're P H D, may God bless you and your endeavors.May you be successful in your careers?And may God keep you in cover you to your journey ✨️




I i have my degree PHD, in More King 🤴 Jesus
When you stand on the word of my father God and my King Jesus 🤴 they carry you through the storm and mountains.. this has been a experience and a that we all.
Must go through.There's a lesson in every blessing as we excel on to a higher level.But without my father God and my king Jesus 🤴 i wouldn't know where i've been!

title: Morehouse College - We Shall Overcome
body: sang this song for about 8 straight hours at MLK's funeral procession. Still brings tears to me especially when it's sung as beautifully as this. leave it to his alma mater for this fantastic post

title: Morehouse College - We Shall Overcome
body: 47 years ago in Georgia I was afraid and beaten.  I look at these young men and i apologize for being afraid.  Jeff

title: Morehouse College - We Shall Overcome
body: We shall overcome the cultural barrier, the language barrier, the race barrier, the class barrier, the country barrier, all folks around world, unite

title: Morehouse College - We Shall Overcome
body: I am from Fiji and my island nation is currently going through the second wave of coronavirus and it has hit us pretty bad. The health workers are exhausted, the nation is losing hope and everyday is like fighting a losing battle against an unknown enemy. I happened to remember we used to sing this back in our school and I looked up the song. This gave me so much hope, for myself and my nation 💙 we definitely shall overcome!
author: @roshnipanda4085

title: Morehouse College - We Shall Overcome
body: I'm too young to completely understand the events that took place during the decade of the sixties. I was not there during the March On Washington on August 28 1963, and yet, I feel as if time, space, and human connection collides together and puts my soul there everytime I here this song. It gives me chills.
author: @Leiri84

title: Morehouse College - We Shall Overcome
body: This song is actually in our churches hymnal (Unitarian Universalist) and we will sing it together sunday the 10th, after the election. Because no matter who wins we need to sing it.
author: @Elizabeth-n3v2u

title: Morehouse College - We Shall Overcome
body: Happy Martin Luther King day everyone. God bless his soul and may his activism against racism, poverty, and war continue to inspire people across the entire world❤️❤️❤️❤️Someday, we shall overcome🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏
author: @sheevpalpatine2901

title: Morehouse College - We Shall Overcome
body: I can't help but cry as I listen to this and reflect on all the racism we in this country are STILL dealing with.  In my mind's eye I can still see the pictures in history books of African Americans, their backs striped with scars, others hung, others in chains.  How brave it is for these individuals to believe in the future.  How incredibly brave.
author: @bonniejuliejohnson5021

title: Morehouse College - We Shall Overcome

title: Billionaire Robert F. Smith pays debt of graduates | 135th Commencement at  Morehouse College
body: Brother Smith is from the same neighborhood as myself, East Denver, CO, except I was bussed to Thomas Jefferson High School, another white school but I started year 9 there.  As much as we hated being bussed there was an advantage to it.  Like Robert stated, we learned to get along with other races and the teachers were the best.  I remember 2 teachers in particular to this day that helped shaped me and that I owe to Mr. Kingsley and Mrs. Hymen, both were fantastic teachers and saw my interest in science.
author: @jonl0711

title: Billionaire Robert F. Smith pays debt of graduates | 135th Commencement at  Morehouse College

body: Wow, he still preaching like this at New Birth 2019. The way he breaks it down Sunday after Sunday the word of God will really change you if you really want it to. title: Morehouse College Campus Tour!
body: Morehouse College is a special place.   I came to Morehouse in 1988.  I can still remember the day I landed on campus for orientation.  In fact, it was a Saturday on the 18th of August.    When I close my eyes, I can still smell the smell of King Chapel.  Should I die anytime soon, Morehouse will receive a $1,000,000 as the beneficiary of my life insurance policy.   Morehouse must survive the winter.   God Bless this House.
author: @aauthorj

title: Morehouse College Campus Tour!
body: Morehouse College is missing a 24 hours study hall for their students / Computer Lab.  Every college has one, but Morehouse College does not.
author: @eb-xe8zw

title: Morehouse College Campus Tour!
body: Awe he's so adorable! Like in a cute and nervous way. He seems sooo sweet. I see why you chose him as your Morehouse brother
author: @nonyabusiness4788

title: Morehouse College Campus Tour!
body: I just fell in love with Morehouse campus!! I love that the AUC holds so much history and tradition!!!! thanks for another great video!!!!
author: @Ken_Tha_Pen

title: Morehouse College Campus Tour!
body: Thank you so much for this.  So many memories come rushing back to me.  Graves Hall was my freshmen dorm.  I also resided in Dubois and White Hall ( the premiere dorm at the time).  Thank you Mr. Mcknight for an informed tour.
author: @vanfortson1021

title: Morehouse College Campus Tour!
body: Great tour.  Hey Malcolm, I hope you are healthy, safe and prosperous. It's amazing how much Da House has expanded from 10 acres and 800 students since when I was a student from 1962 to 66. Is daily chapel still compulsory for freshmen? I will continue to help the best school on the planet grow and prosper.  Won't y'all join me with open wallets?
author: @samtrak1204

title: Morehouse College Campus Tour!
body: This young man did a fantastic job showing us around!  With all his knowledge and extreme remembrance of where everything is inspires me more to attend this College.  And that last thing he said about the Church surprised me cause I did not know that you couldn't be accepted in the Church unless you're w Spelman&Morehouse couple.  I kinda think that's a bit to much.  I mean I'm a Church man and I would like to go to a near by Church.
author: @jaquayvius

title: UPDATED MOREHOUSE COLLEGE FRESHMAN DORM TOUR | Freshman CC

title: Morehouse College Campus Tour - SCJ Consulting
body: 1:18:47 This is false. Harkness Hall never belonged solely to Morehouse College. This was an Atlanta University building prior to its consolidation with Clark College. I believe at one point it served as an admin building for the other schools but it was never a Morehouse building.
author: @BroccoliRob3000

title: Morehouse College Campus Tour - SCJ Consulting
body: As a freshman at Morehouse in 2012, I was not informed why the doors of the Howard Thurman Obelisk only open twice a year. Also, what was the significance of the big stone block in the middle of century campus grass with the year on it?
author: @_Nvrse.Almighty

title: Morehouse College - Virtual Walking Tour [4k 60fps]
body: Looks clean but the buildings don't have that collegiate look like a lot of colleges and universities. Maybe Graves Hall , the building towards the end of the video, but that's about it. Lots of parking lots. Thanks for highlighting the college. MLKs alma mater💯
author: @BroccoliRob3000
